title: apollo THE HOUSEWARES BRAND - Set of 6 x Heat Resistant Cork Round Coasters - Protects From Drips Dents Hot Mugs - Non Slip - Easy Clean - Size 10cm
features: Coasters are a must to protect your surfaces from damage from drips, dents, and hot mugs. These cork coasters will protect your surfaces and the natural cork compliments the modern, clean look of today

Cork is the spongy inner bark from a type of Oak tree native to dry Mediterranean regions. It is durable and heat resistant. It can be harvested every 9-12 years without harm to the tree. This renewable resource is extremely valuable to the environment
A set of 6, extreme resistance to high temperatures- ideal for protecting surface from hot cups, mugs, glasses
Non slip and easy to clean. Wipe clean with a damp cloth to remove any food particles or light stains An occasional scrub with a dish brush will remove any stubborn deposits
description: Product Description The perfect coaster, made from cork from western Europe. Heat resistant and wont damage your table top. Box Contains 6 cork coasters
